script: (function(){ var result = {}; var aiRelated = document.querySelectorAll('[class*="ai"], [class*="Ai"], [class*="AI"], [class*="diandian"], [class*="summarize"], [class*="answer"], [class*="chat"]'); result.aiRelatedVisible = Array.from(aiRelated).filter(function(e){ var r = e.getBoundingClientRect(); return r.width > 100 && r.height > 50; }).map(function(e){ var r = e.getBoundingClientRect(); return { tag: e.tagName, className: (e.className||'').toString().substring(0,100), x: Math.round(r.x), y: Math.round(r.y), w: Math.round(r.width), h: Math.round(r.height), text: (e.innerText||'').substring(0,150).replace(/\n/g,' ') }; }); var searchLayout = document.querySelector('.search-layout'); if (searchLayout) { result.searchLayoutChildren = Array.from(searchLayout.children).map(function(c){ var r = c.getBoundingClientRect(); return { tag: c.tagName, className: (c.className||'').toString().substring(0,100), visible: r.width > 0 && r.height > 0, x: Math.round(r.x), y: Math.round(r.y), w: Math.round(r.width), h: Math.round(r.height) }; }); } var searchLayoutMain = document.querySelector('.search-layout__main'); if (searchLayoutMain) { result.searchLayoutMainChildren = Array.from(searchLayoutMain.children).map(function(c){ var r = c.getBoundingClientRect(); return { tag: c.tagName, className: (c.className||'').toString().substring(0,100), visible: r.width > 0 && r.height > 0, x: Math.round(r.x), y: Math.round(r.y), w: Math.round(r.width), h: Math.round(r.height) }; }); } return result; })()
